subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Us unto him who hath been mentioned before the Throne, that the breezes of remembrance may stir him to soar upon the wings of yearning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن ذکر لدی العرش لتحرکه نفحات الذکر الی مقام یطیر باجنحه الاشتیاق
